basic_details.job_title: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for JGM, DGM, Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 35–62 years (post-wise) who have B.E./B.Tech or relevant Engineering qualifications are eligible to apply for these posts. The online application process for GMRC Recruitment 2026 has started on 29 April 2026 and will remain open until 13 May 2026.

age_limit.details: JGM (Telecom/AFC) on Contract: Maximum age is 50 years. JGM (Telecom/AFC) on Deputation: Maximum age is 58 years. JGM (Telecom/AFC) on Post-superannuation: Maximum age is 62 years. DGM (Traction) on Contract: Maximum age is 45 years. DGM (Traction) on Deputation: Maximum age is 58 years. DGM (Traction) on Post-superannuation: Maximum age is 62 years. Asst. Manager (Rolling Stock) on Contract/Deputation: Maximum age is 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per GMRC rules.

qualification.details: JGM (Telecom/AFC): B.E./B.Tech (Electronics & Communications/Electrical & Electronics/Computer Science/Information Technology or equivalent) DGM (Traction): Graduate engineering in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Asst. Manager (Rolling Stock): B.E./B.Tech (Electrical/Mechanical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Power Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent)

vacancy_details.Post Name: JGM (Telecom/AFC) on Contract/Deputation/Post-superannuation basis, for Surat Metro Project
DGM (Traction) on Contract/Deputation/Post-superannuation basis, for Surat Metro Project
Asst. Manager (Rolling Stock) on Contract/Deputation - O&M, Ahmedabad

salary_details.details: The salary for all the posts ranges from Rs. 50000 to Rs. 240000 Per Month.

selection_process: Personal Interview Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GMRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) recruitment is 13 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of JGM (Telecom/AFC), DGM (Traction), and Asst. Manager (Rolling Stock).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for the GMRC recruitment through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will range from Rs. 50000 to Rs. 240000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post and include B.E./B.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines such as Electronics & Communications, Electrical & Electronics, Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical, and Mechanical.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Personal Interview, Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for the Asst. Manager (Rolling Stock) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Asst. Manager (Rolling Stock) post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q9. Which projects are these vacancies for?
faq.answer: The vacancies are for the Surat Metro Project (JGM and DGM posts) and for O&M in Ahmedabad (Asst. Manager post).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
